item.description:
Important

  • Requires Mac OS X 14.0 (Sonoma) or newer.

New Features

  • More Export Formats: Expanded options to include AVIF and PSD.
  • Adobe Illustrator Support: You can now process AI files (provided they were saved with PDF compatibility).
  • Lanczos Resampling: Implemented the Lanczos algorithm for greater image quality and sharpness when resizing.
  • Background Conversion Queue: You can now continue adding images to the app while a conversion is already running without interrupting or overriding the current process.
  • Advanced Conversion Refresh: Added Modifier Buttons (for 'Delete Originals' and 'Recursive Folders') and a Reset Button (to quickly revert to default conversion values) directly into the window. Introduced Keyboard Shortcuts for faster format selection.
  • Improved Output Selection: You can now drag and drop a folder directly into the 'Advanced Conversion' or 'Settings' window to set your output destination.
  • 'Open With' Integration: Peggy now appears in the macOS 'Open With' context menu for all compatible file types.
  • Resize 'Long Edge' Option: Added a new resizing mode to target the longest dimension of an image while maintaining aspect ratio.
  • Metadata Control: Added a new toggle in the 'Advanced Conversion' window to enable or disable metadata stripping.

Fixes & Improvements

  • Refined Interface: General UI design improvements for a cleaner look and feel.
  • Persistent Undo: The 'Undo' option now survives app closures, allowing you to revert changes even after restarting the app.
  • Timestamp Preservation: Fixed a bug to ensure original metadata timestamps are copied over to the new file instead of being reset to the current time.
  • WEBP Orientation: Resolved an issue where WEBP files would lose rotation/orientation data during conversion.
  • Descriptive Notifications: Reworded app notifications to provide clearer, more helpful feedback.
  • Enhanced Logging: Improved internal logging to assist with troubleshooting and performance monitoring.
